_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: Analysis of BenMen-1 (Grade 1) and KT21-MG1 (Grade 3) meningioma cell lines, both NF2-null, also showed raised ALDH1A1 levels compared to control human meningeal cells
details: Showed raised ALDH1A1 levels compared to control human meningeal cells
